# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

- Deploy an Nginx Pod and Service using Helm
  - Make sure that you define the correct namespace!
    - The nginx pod should be in the `ingress` namespace (see https://github.com/kubernetes/charts/tree/master/stable/nginx)
      - You can make it available to all namespaces, but then the ingress will be publicly accessible by anyone who knows its address
- Define an Ingress resource that serves all traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
